title: Wynncraft Legendary Tooltips
description: Added 9 custom tooltips using Legendary Tooltips
body:
Hello! I'm Focal. I added custom tooltips using [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips).
I recommanded to install [Serverpack Priority](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpack-priority) Mod!! # About this pack
This resourcepack just add fancy custom tooltips. ## Compare | Before | After | | :--: | :--: | | ![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd01d09aab1293bdf30f0feea8564961cfe69460.png) | ![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c84259b6279a795c71b576e9321ab750b3fb46.png) | --- **If you want to see me create more content, supporting my work gives me the energy to make more stuff.**
> [![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a368690a65792758810fc081de33e5fa9c5a04.png)](https://ko-fi.com/focalsalt)
> [![Support me on Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150ad87ca2fc99b8e1ebb73e00d2ac1c9a6d0c83.png)](https://patreon.com/focalsalt) --- Any BUG or Suggest, welcome to my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sErWHY8PXH) to report.
Hope you like it, enjoy :D
